serviceDescription: This data is intended for read-only use. The purpose of the data is to provide display, identification, and analysis tools for determining locations of designated communications sites located on National Forest System lands, for Forest Service managers and other interested parties.
description: This data is intended for read-only use. The purpose of the data is to provide display, identification, and analysis tools for determining locations of designated communications sites located on National Forest System lands, for Forest Service managers and other interested parties.

documentInfo.Title: Util_CommSite_SpeclUse
documentInfo.Comments: This data is intended for read-only use. The purpose of the data is to provide display, identification, and analysis tools for determining locations of designated communications sites located on National Forest System lands, for Forest Service managers and other interested parties.
documentInfo.Subject: An area of National Forest System (NFS) lands administered by an administrative unit for the purpose of authorizing, via a lease or permit, a government or non-government entity to construct, operate, maintain and terminate communications facilities and ancillary improvements. The area encompasses NFS lands that are specifically designated for this purpose.
